title: Greeting Someone New
description: Introduce yourself to someone you've just met, share your name and nationality.
canDo: Greet someone and introduce yourself with your name and country.
sampleDialogue: はじめまして。わたしは…です。

lines.speaker: New acquaintance
lines.text: はじめまして。わたしは…です。
lines.translation: Introduce yourself to someone you've just met, share your name and nationality.

title: Exchanging Contact Info
description: Exchange phone numbers or email addresses with a new friend.
canDo: Ask for and give basic contact information like phone numbers.
sampleDialogue: でんわばんごうは なんですか。

lines.speaker: Classmate
lines.text: でんわばんごうは なんですか。
lines.translation: Exchange phone numbers or email addresses with a new friend.

title: Talking About Your Interests
description: Talk about things you like — food, sports, music, or hobbies.
canDo: Say what you like and ask others about their interests.
sampleDialogue: すきな たべものは なんですか。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: すきな たべものは なんですか。
lines.translation: Talk about things you like — food, sports, music, or hobbies.

title: Weekend Activities
description: Talk about what you do on weekends — watch TV, play sports, go shopping.
sampleDialogue: しゅうまつ、なにを しますか。

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.text: しゅうまつ、なにを しますか。
lines.translation: Talk about what you do on weekends — watch TV, play sports, go shopping.

title: Describing Your Family
description: Tell someone about your family members — who they are and what they do.
canDo: Introduce family members and say basic facts about them.
sampleDialogue: かぞくは なんにんですか。
practicePrompts: Say how many people are in your family
Describe what a family member does

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Say how many people are in your family
lines.translation: Say how many people are in your family

lines.speaker: Host family member
lines.text: かぞくは なんにんですか。
lines.translation: Tell someone about your family members — who they are and what they do.

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Describe what a family member does
lines.translation: Describe what a family member does

title: Showing Photos
titleJa: しゃしんを みせる
description: Show someone a photo and explain who or what is in it.
canDo: Point to people in a photo and say who they are.
sampleDialogue: これは ちちです。かいしゃいんです。
practicePrompts: Point out someone in a photo

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Point out someone in a photo
lines.translation: Point out someone in a photo

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: これは ちちです。かいしゃいんです。
lines.translation: Show someone a photo and explain who or what is in it.

title: Ordering Food
titleJa: たべものを ちゅうもんする
description: Order a meal at a simple restaurant or food stall.
canDo: Order food and drinks, ask for the bill.
sampleDialogue: すみません。ラーメンを おねがいします。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: すみません。ラーメンを おねがいします。
lines.translation: Order a meal at a simple restaurant or food stall.

title: Talking About Food You Like
description: Discuss your favourite dishes and ask about theirs.
canDo: Name foods you like or dislike and ask others.
sampleDialogue: にほんりょうりで なにが すきですか。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: にほんりょうりで なにが すきですか。
lines.translation: Discuss your favourite dishes and ask about theirs.

title: Describing Your Home
description: Describe your house or apartment — rooms, furniture, location.
canDo: Describe rooms in your home and say where things are.
sampleDialogue: わたしの へやは ちいさいですが、きれいです。

lines.speaker: Roommate
lines.text: わたしの へやは ちいさいですが、きれいです。
lines.translation: Describe your house or apartment — rooms, furniture, location.

title: Finding Things in a Room
titleJa: どこに ありますか
description: Ask where something is located in a room or building.
canDo: Ask and answer where objects are using location words.
sampleDialogue: トイレは どこですか。

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: トイレは どこですか。
lines.translation: Ask where something is located in a room or building.

title: Going Shopping
description: Buy something at a shop — ask the price, choose a colour or size.
canDo: Ask prices, choose items, and complete a simple purchase.
sampleDialogue: これは いくらですか。

lines.speaker: Shop clerk
lines.text: これは いくらですか。
lines.translation: Buy something at a shop — ask the price, choose a colour or size.

title: Choosing a Gift
titleJa: おみやげを えらぶ
description: Pick a souvenir or gift for someone and explain your choice.
canDo: Choose a gift, say who it's for and why.
sampleDialogue: ともだちに おみやげを かいたいです。
practicePrompts: Say who the gift is for

lines.speaker: Learner
lines.text: Say who the gift is for
lines.translation: Say who the gift is for

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: ともだちに おみやげを かいたいです。
lines.translation: Pick a souvenir or gift for someone and explain your choice.

title: Talking About Your Town
description: Describe your town or neighbourhood — what's nearby, what you can do there.
canDo: Describe your town and say what facilities are nearby.
sampleDialogue: わたしの まちに こうえんが あります。

lines.speaker: Penpal
lines.text: わたしの まちに こうえんが あります。
lines.translation: Describe your town or neighbourhood — what's nearby, what you can do there.

title: Giving Simple Directions
description: Tell someone how to get to a nearby place using simple directions.
canDo: Give and understand basic directions (left, right, straight).
sampleDialogue: まっすぐ いって、みぎに まがってください。

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.text: まっすぐ いって、みぎに まがってください。
lines.translation: Tell someone how to get to a nearby place using simple directions.

title: Making Plans to Meet
description: Arrange a time and place to meet up with a friend.
canDo: Suggest a time and place, agree or suggest an alternative.
sampleDialogue: どようびに あいましょうか。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: どようびに あいましょうか。
lines.translation: Arrange a time and place to meet up with a friend.

title: Declining an Invitation
description: Politely say you can't go and suggest another time.
canDo: Politely decline an invitation and give a simple reason.
sampleDialogue: すみません、どようびは ちょっと…。

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.text: すみません、どようびは ちょっと…。
lines.translation: Politely say you can't go and suggest another time.

title: Talking About a Trip
description: Tell someone about a trip you took or plan to take.
canDo: Say where you went, what you did, and what you thought.
sampleDialogue: きょうとに いきました。とても きれいでした。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: きょうとに いきました。とても きれいでした。
lines.translation: Tell someone about a trip you took or plan to take.

title: At a Hotel
description: Check in at a hotel, ask about facilities, request something.
canDo: Handle basic hotel interactions — check in, ask about Wi-Fi, request items.
sampleDialogue: チェックイン おねがいします。

lines.speaker: Hotel receptionist
lines.text: チェックイン おねがいします。
lines.translation: Check in at a hotel, ask about facilities, request something.
